requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and IEC 63056 as International Baseline for Grenada BESS Project Acceptance; GDBS Conformity Framework
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619和IEC 63056作为格林纳达BESS项目验收的国际基准；GDBS合格评定框架
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619和IEC 63056作為格瑞那達BESS項目驗收的國際基準；GDBS合格評定框架

summary.en: The Grenada Bureau of Standards (GDBS), established under the Standards Act (Cap. 296), is Grenada's national standards body responsible for developing, adopting, and promoting standards and conformity assessment. GDBS adopts and references IEC standards given Grenada's IEC/UK-legacy technical framework as an OECS member state. GDBS institutional capacity is still developing and a confirmed mandatory pre-shipment conformity assessment scheme specifically for BESS cells, modules, or systems had not been identified from official sources as of the dataset date. However, IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules in IEC-framework markets. IEC 63056:2020 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements) provides additional system-level battery safety requirements. Project owners, EPCs, and GRENLEC connection agreements for utility-scale and C&I storage projects in Grenada are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite for project acceptance. Exporters should verify the current GDBS mandatory regulated product list directly with GDBS before shipment, as Grenada's regulatory publication may be limited.
summary.zh: 格林纳达标准局（GDBS）依据《标准法》（第296章）设立，是格林纳达负责制定、采纳和推广标准及合格评定的国家标准机构。鉴于格林纳达作为OECS成员国的IEC/英国传统技术框架，GDBS采纳和引用IEC标准。GDBS机构能力仍在建设中，截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认专门针对BESS电芯、模组或系统的强制装运前合格评定方案。然而，IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是IEC框架市场中锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准。IEC 63056:2020（电化学储能系统用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）提供额外的系统级电池安全要求。格林纳达公用事业规模和工商业储能项目的业主、EPC承包商及GRENLEC并网协议，预计将以IEC 62619合规作为项目验收的技术前提。出口商在出货前应直接向GDBS核实现行强制受监管产品清单，因格林纳达的法规发布可能有限。
summary.zht: 格瑞那達標準局（GDBS）依據《標準法》（第296章）設立，是格瑞那達負責制定、採納和推廣標準及合格評定的國家標準機構。鑑於格瑞那達作為OECS成員國的IEC/英國傳統技術框架，GDBS採納和引用IEC標準。GDBS機構能力仍在建設中，截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認專門針對BESS電芯、模組或系統的強制裝運前合格評定方案。然而，IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是IEC框架市場中鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準。IEC 63056:2020（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）提供額外的系統級電池安全要求。格瑞那達公用事業規模和工商業儲能項目的業主、EPC承包商及GRENLEC併網協議，預計將以IEC 62619合規作為項目驗收的技術前提。出口商在出貨前應直接向GDBS核實現行強制受監管產品清單，因格瑞那達的法規發布可能有限。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in IEC-framework markets including Grenada)
IEC 63056:2020 — Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements (system-level battery safety standard expected in project specifications)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard referenced in project specifications)

Grenada Bureau of Standards (GDBS) — Standards Act Cap. 296 (verify current mandatory regulated product scope directly with GDBS; no confirmed mandatory BESS-specific conformity scheme as of dataset date)
Public Utilities Regulatory Commission (PURC) — energy regulatory authority; verify any PURC product safety requirements for grid-connected storage

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. GB/T 34131-2017 (Technical Requirements for Battery Management System for Electric Energy Storage) governs BMS requirements. GB 38031-2020 (Electric Vehicles — Traction Battery Safety Requirements) covers cell-level safety for EV batteries and is sometimes referenced for BESS cells. None of these Chinese standards are accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 or IEC 63056 in Grenada project specifications or GDBS-referenced frameworks. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。GB/T 34131-2017（电力储能用电池管理系统技术要求）管控BMS要求。GB 38031-2020（电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求）覆盖电动汽车电芯级安全，有时也被引用于BESS电芯。上述中国标准均不被格林纳达项目规格或GDBS参考框架接受为IEC 62619或IEC 63056的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。GB/T 34131-2017（電力儲能用電池管理系統技術要求）管控BMS要求。GB 38031-2020（電動汽車用動力蓄電池安全要求）覆蓋電動汽車電芯級安全，有時也被引用於BESS電芯。上述中國標準均不被格瑞那達項目規格或GDBS參考框架接受為IEC 62619或IEC 63056的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)
GB/T 34131-2017 — 电力储能用电池管理系统技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Battery Management System for Electric Energy Storage; voluntary)
GB 38031-2020 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求 (Electric Vehicles — Traction Battery Safety Requirements; mandatory for EV batteries; sometimes referenced for BESS cells)

gap.en: Critical gap: Grenada project owners and GRENLEC connection agreements reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules, consistent with IEC-framework practice across OECS member states. Chinese GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 34131-2017, and GB 38031-2020 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 or IEC 63056 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications. Exporters should: (a) verify the current GDBS mandatory regulated product list for any pre-shipment conformity obligation — GDBS institutional capacity is developing and published documentation may be limited; direct engagement is required; (b) obtain IEC 62619:2022 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Grenada BESS projects; (c) consider IEC 63056:2020 evidence for system-level battery assembly safety; (d) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification or GRENLEC connection agreement before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 关键差距：格林纳达项目业主和GRENLEC并网协议将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据，与OECS成员国IEC框架实践一致。中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 34131-2017和GB 38031-2020未与IEC 62619或IEC 63056协调，不被项目技术规格接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）核实现行GDBS强制受监管产品清单，确认是否存在装运前合格义务——GDBS机构能力仍在建设中，公开文件可能有限，须直接接触；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至格林纳达BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619:2022型式试验证书；（c）考虑取得系统级电池组件安全的IEC 63056:2020证据；（d）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格或GRENLEC并网协议中引用的IEC 62619版本。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：格瑞那達項目業主和GRENLEC併網協議將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據，與OECS成員國IEC框架實踐一致。中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 34131-2017和GB 38031-2020未與IEC 62619或IEC 63056協調，不被項目技術規格接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）核實現行GDBS強制受監管產品清單，確認是否存在裝運前合格義務——GDBS機構能力仍在建設中，公開文件可能有限，須直接接觸；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至格瑞那達BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619:2022型式試驗證書；（c）考慮取得系統級電池組件安全的IEC 63056:2020證據；（d）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格或GRENLEC併網協議中引用的IEC 62619版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where GRENLEC or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; GDBS mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS has not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with GDBS; PURC may impose additional requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard for lithium BESS cells, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 34131-2017 are voluntary; GB 38031-2020 is mandatory for EV traction batteries

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Grenada as of the dataset date; GDBS institutional capacity is still developing and published documentation is limited. However, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Grenada project specifications and GRENLEC connection agreements, consistent with IEC-framework practice across OECS member states. Chinese GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 34131, and GB 38031 certification alone is not sufficient for Grenada project acceptance. Verify GDBS current mandatory regulated product scope and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, GRENLEC, PURC, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，格林纳达尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；GDBS机构能力仍在建设中，公开文件有限。然而，IEC 62619是格林纳达项目规格和GRENLEC并网协议中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准，与OECS成员国IEC框架实践一致。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 34131和GB 38031认证不足以满足格林纳达项目验收要求。出货前请核实GDBS现行强制受监管产品范围，并向项目业主、GRENLEC、PURC及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，格瑞那達尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；GDBS機構能力仍在建設中，公開文件有限。然而，IEC 62619是格瑞那達項目規格和GRENLEC併網協議中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準，與OECS成員國IEC框架實踐一致。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 34131和GB 38031認證不足以滿足格瑞那達項目驗收要求。出貨前請核實GDBS現行強制受監管產品範圍，並向項目業主、GRENLEC、PURC及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619證據要求。
